_publications._publicationTitle: Ketotifen Modulates Mast Cell Chemotaxis to Kit-Ligand, but Does Not Impact Mast Cell Numbers, Degranulation, or Tumor Behavior in Neurofibromas of

_contextSnippet: Nf1 flox/flox ;PostnCre+ mice begin to acquire Schwann cell hyperplasia at approximately 4–6 weeks of age prior to the formation of multiple pNFs
details: Mice begin to acquire Schwann cell hyperplasia at approximately 4-6 weeks of age prior to formation of multiple pNFs
